metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for structured development workflows, meeting intelligence, and productivity tools

plugins.description: RPIV structured development workflow: Requirements → Plan → Implementation → Validation

plugins.name: mint
plugins.description: MINT (Meeting Intelligence) pipeline: audio → transcript → refined → polished → structured insights

plugins.description: Session retrospective: extract reusable lessons and insights from your current conversation

plugins.description: Red-Blue adversarial review: structured attack-defense analysis on plans, architectures, and decisions

plugins.name: insight
